caption: A man with blond hair, wearing a dark blue t-shirt and white over-ear headphones, is shown in a small picture-in-picture window over a video game interface. He is positioned in front of a background featuring a white wall with a "20" logo and festive green decorations. The game screen displays a "LINEUP" menu for a football team, specifically the "DEFENSE" tab. The interface lists player positions such as "FS1," "MLB1," and "LB1," with player cards showing names like "POLAMALU," "ALEXANDER," and "PETERSON." At the top of the screen, numerical values are visible, including "173,037," "14,600," and "2,343,543," along with "LV 19" and "91." As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts from a neutral look to a surprised open-mouthed expression, while the game screen remains largely static, with only a few subtle shifts in the cursor or highlights.
